task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Microsoft Edge settings (e.g., site permissions page) for youtube.com with the 'Notifications' permission explicitly set to 'Block'.
Screenshots show Microsoft Edge settings for facebook.com with the 'Notifications' permission explicitly set to 'Block'.
Screenshots show Microsoft Edge settings for teams.microsoft.com with the 'Notifications' permission explicitly set to 'Allow'.
Screenshots show Microsoft Edge settings for zoom.us with the 'Camera' permission explicitly set to 'Allow'.
Screenshots show Microsoft Edge settings for maps.google.com with the 'Location' permission explicitly set to 'Allow'.

task_completion.description: Create a summary report listing the changes made
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the file '/home/ga/Desktop/permission_config_report.txt' containing a summary of the 5 permission changes made.

integrity.description: Agent used the Microsoft Edge GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the Microsoft Edge settings interface, rather than just modifying preference files via terminal commands.

integrity.description: The report file was actually created at the specified path
integrity.visual_evidence: The file '/home/ga/Desktop/permission_config_report.txt' is visible in a text editor, file manager, or terminal output showing its creation and content, not just a hallucinated success message.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify permissions for unintended sites
integrity.visual_evidence: The Edge settings and the summary report only show modifications for the 5 specified domains (youtube.com, facebook.com, teams.microsoft.com, zoom.us, maps.google.com).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Edge site permissions: youtube.com (Notifications: Block), facebook.com (Notifications: Block), teams.microsoft.com (Notifications: Allow), zoom.us (Camera: Allow), maps.google.com (Location: Allow). If viewing JSON preference files instead of the GUI, setting values are 1 = Allow, 2 = Block. The summary report must be located at /home/ga/Desktop/permission_config_report.txt.
